Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»Team South Africa involved in FIVE sports on Saturday, 10 August

Team South Africa are involved in five sports at the 2024 Paris Olympics on Saturday, 10 August as the Games draw to a close.

Team South Africaare involved infivesports at the2024 Paris Olympicson Saturday, 10 August as the Games draw to a close.

Enjoy the Paris Olympic Games 2024 experience at your favourite ATKV Resort!

There’s an early start with the men’s marathon, where Elroy Galant and Stephen Mokoka take to the Paris roads.

There are three further track and field medals up for grabs in the evening session, with Brian Raats (high jump), Jo-Ane van Dyk (javelin) and the Team SA men’s 4x400m relay all in action.

Van Dyk and the men’s 4x400m are considered possible medal contenders.

The United States (33 golds) lead China (also 33), Australia (18) and Japan (16) in the medal standings.

Team SA are 40th with one gold (Tatjana Smith), two silvers (Smith and men’s 4x100m) and two bronzes (men’s Sevens rugby and Alan Hatherly).

For the latest Paris Olympics 2024 news, bookmarkThe South African website’sdedicated section for free-to-read content

Men’s marathon (08:00):Elroy Galant and Stephen Mokoka

Men’s high jump, final (19:00): Brian Raats

Women’s javelin, final (19:30): Jo-Ane van Dyk

Men’s 4x400m, final (21:00): Team SA

Men’s kayak single 1000m semi-finals (11:20):Hamish Lovemore

Men’s keiren, first round heats (17:31):Jean Spies

Women’s individual, fourth round (09:44):Paula Reto is on 227 and tied for 49th after rounds of 78, 73 and 76

Women’s individual, fourth round (12:06):Ashleigh Buhai is on 141 after three rounds. She’s shot 68, 73 and 74 for 215.

Men’s 97kg freestyle, 1/8 final:Nicholas de Lange vs Givi Matcharashvili (Georgia)
